remarks: Bright, move-in ready, and full of natural light, this cheerful second-floor two-bedroom, one-bath offers a spacious eat-in kitchen perfect for everyday living and entertaining. Located in the heart of vibrant downtown Stamford, you'll enjoy walking distance to everything the city has to offer, including the Stamford Train Station, UConn Stamford, and a variety of popular neighborhood restaurants and bars. No car necessary. Street parking only.
